title: G-Type light shuttle

'''G-Type light shuttles,''' also known as '''G-Wing shuttles''', were small armed [[Transport/Legends|transports]] used during the [[Jedi Civil War]] and [[Sith Civil War]]s. They were used to ferry small parties back and forth between planets and capital ships.

==Characteristics==
[[File:G-Type_light_shuttle_escorted.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A G-Type light shuttle escorted by two [[Star Saber XC-01 starfighter]]s]]
There were at least two configurations for this ship.<ref name="KOTORCG" /> In one configuration, it could ferry at least three people with no difficulty. To assist less-experienced pilots, advanced pilot programming was installed.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

Another configuration, labeled as an "escape ship," could carry only one person, making room for more equipment to improve survivability. As this second configuration was an escape ship, it had greater [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]], a hyperdrive and extra supplies.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==History==
[[Bastila Shan]] used such a shuttle of the second type to travel from [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]] to the [[Star Forge]]. Later, [[Canderous Ordo]] used one of the 3-person variants when traveling from [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]] to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]].<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-08-19 -->''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
